mapper.select:
select * from t_unit a
where a.zid=#{id}
select * from t_unit a order by ztype,zsortindex
select * from t_unit a where xqbh like #{xqbhLike} order by ztype,zsortindex
select * from t_unit a where zxqbh = #{zxqbh}
mapper.insert:
insert into t_unit (
zid, zcode, zname, ztel, zaddress, zlinkman, zpassword, ztype, zunitcode, zsortindex, zroletype, zxqbh, zxqdw
)values(
#{zid,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zname,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ztel,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zaddress,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zlinkman,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zpassword,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{ztype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zunitcode,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zsortindex,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zroletype,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zxqbh,jdbcType=VARCHAR}, #{zxqdw,jdbcType=VARCHAR} )
